review: Absolutely stunning event decoration! The on-site team was professional, prompt, and exceeded all expectations. Booking the package through the app was simple.
The in-studio consultation was very informative. They helped me pick the perfect home decor package. The availability checker is a lifesaver!
Used the 'Wedding Luxe' package. Tracking the service status in the app was very convenient. Minor delay on setup, but the final look was flawless.
Seamless payment process and real-time updates on my decoration booking. Highly recommend StyleDecor for ceremony services!
Good value for money. The decorator was friendly, but the initial online booking process felt a little slow. Overall happy with the final result.
Needed a quick corporate event setup. The 'Business Blitz' package was delivered flawlessly and the online status tracking was very useful.
The in-studio mock-up was great! The decorator (Maria) was super helpful. The web app made scheduling and paying a breeze.
Excellent service and responsive customer support when I needed to adjust my booking date. The calendar availability feature worked perfectly.
My home consultation was fantastic. The decorator arrived on time and offered creative, budget-friendly ideas. Top-notch service!
The decoration was good, but the initial confusion between 'in-studio' and 'on-site' modes during booking caused a slight issue. Needs clearer labeling.
Love the ability to track service status after payment. It gave me peace of mind. The decorator's work was beautiful for my anniversary party.
